command: echo "DIRS:" && for d in packages/opencode/test/*/; do echo "  $d"; done && echo "FILES:" && for f in packages/opencode/test/*.test.ts; do echo "  $f"; done
reason: List test directories and direct test files

command: for d in packages/opencode/test/tool/ packages/opencode/test/mcp/ packages/opencode/test/agent/ packages/opencode/test/acp/ packages/opencode/test/session/ packages/opencode/test/server/ packages/open
reason: List all test files within each test subdirectory

command: echo "--- package.json lint ---" && cat packages/opencode/package.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(k,v) for k,v in d.items() if 'lint' in str(k).lower() or 'format' i
echo "=== TEST FILES ===" && find test -name "*.test.ts" -type f | sort && echo "=== COLOCATED TESTS ===" && find src -name "*.test.ts" -type f | sort
reason: Get complete list of all test files
